title: vetiveria zizanioides var. nigritana
intro: Vetiveria zizanioides var. nigritana, commonly known as Khas or Vetiver grass, is a type of plant belonging to the Poaceae family. It is a variant of the vetiver grass and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from anxiety and other mental health issues. Vetiveria zizanioides var. nigritana can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used for medicinal and therapeutic purposes.
